reviews.review_description: I have always loved rec room and I have grown up with it. I understand that its shutdown is permanent. Please reconsider your decision. Many people love rec room and get on every day to socialize and enjoy time with their friends. Many people also worked very hard to make their games and even dorms too. Imagine how many people would be disappointed. New players,old players,game creators,Non game creators,content creators, and everyone else who has participated in this game. I know this decision is already made. But please… save rec room… best of wishes to all of you,developers and players. I love you rec room… goodbye…

reviews.review_title: Rec room, save my life literally
reviews.review_description: Around 2018 I was very VERY depressed and I was thinking about deleting myself (if you know you know) I’m good now, ￼but rec room helped me through those times and I am just grateful that I did not do something that I would regret in the future,I made friends lots of friends. I actually became happy in rough times I will never forget ￼rec room as one of the greatest games on VR and it allowed me to make so many memories with my friends and my cousins rec room just…. thank you for all of those memories that you helped me make ￼ rec room overall I’m gonna miss you. You really helped me through some rough years of my life. thank you from the bottom of my heart seriously thank you I don’t think anything well fill that spot when you’re gone rec room I really am gonna miss you￼

This game has brought me unimaginable joy, just being in the game was fun. So heres a poem I wrote with some help of my friends. 

The neon glow begins to fade away,
The locker rooms are turning off their lights.
No more paintball battles left to play,
No more climbing up the questing heights.

We stood as avatars of blocks and string,
And built whole worlds inside a simple space.
I never knew how much a game could bring,
Until I had to leave this pixel place.

The theater lobbies echo with the past,
Where friends from everywhere would meet to talk.
We always knew the fun could never last,
But it still hurts to take this final walk.

Goodbye to every room we used to share,
The memories are locked inside my mind.
A piece of youth is vanishing to air,
And leaving all our golden days behind.

Goodbye rec room, we will all miss you🌹

I have made over 500 friends over the 5 years I have been on this platform. On the same day, I received my headset. On June 1, 2021, I immediately started playing in the rec room, VRChat, and Beat Saber. Even though the game is being shut down on June 1st 2026, it will still hold a special place in my heart for all the time I have given to this platform. It sucks that school's out and I'm never gonna be able to see some of my friends again. I was willing to test the limits of the rec room, like spamming paint mines and grenades in a special private room. With all my friends trying to try and crash the game, I have never been able to crash it. Now, the servers are shutting down forever on the same day I got my headset. Farewell, time for graduation. I will carry the spirit of rec room in my heart forever.

I love this game more than any others. This has been a huge hit in the vr community. Many people love this game. We all know that this is permanent but please think about it and bring it back. This game has been a thing since 2015. That's 11 years of fun, creativity, community events, games and sports. This game truly was loved by many vr players.

I loved this game while it’s been. It carried me through my childhood but now it’s sadly ending. 
This game helped me make many friends and social skills but it’s so sad to see it go😔.
Hopefully one day they will remake the game and keep rec room alive.

EVERYBODY READ THIS PLZ!!!￼￼


The first day, my friend showed me rec room. It seemed too good to be true. Looking back at all the fond memories I’ve had with me and my friends. struggling to beat Isle of the lost skull, and my one pro friend destroying me in paintball. It’s just so sad to see it go. I have genuinely loved this game from day one. Thank you so much for all you’ve done for me.￼



But I also have an idea to hopefully keep it going… If everybody reading this message logs on on May 31 4 o’clock eastern time then maybe the devs will see how desperate we are. Again, May 31 4 o’clock Eastern time. ￼￼ tell your friends tell your friends friends tell your friends, friends, friends, try to get as many people on at that time.￼ and if this doesn’t work, thank you so much rec room for all you’ve done for all of us. ￼

I don’t have much to say other than thank you for the opportunity to experience a beautiful game such as this, the memories can never be recreated nor forgotten. But all beautiful things must come to and end that’s what makes those memories so bittersweet. Thank you coach and thank you rec room team.

reviews.review_title: A few hours before the shutdown
reviews.review_description: The experience of Rec room will allways be in my heart and mind as Rec room shuts down in  0.8 days I reminisce in all my experiences all my friends and all the fun as it becomes a dead waste land in a matter of days  but the community will still be thriving even at a massive loss like Rec room we still will survive I know rec room had helped many through hard times and I am  thankful to the devs for helping all of them thank you Rec room thank you coach thank you the devs  and thank you the creators

Rec room, you've given me the best memories especially with the friendgroup of mine, I remember beginning in 2021 clueless to what I'd Soon experience until my friends got the game. We used to play this all the time back in 22-24 and basically grew on this game, yknow we've hit puberty on this game. Thank you for everything you've gIven us. Goodbye.

When I got my vr in Christmas 2023 dec 25th this was the first game I downloaded and I launched the game when I got to tutorial I instantly got addicted to the game and as soon as I finished tutorial I started playing games where I met my first online friend I forgot his name tho but it was in uno but I think it was called one or sum but that when I also took my first photo and hanged out with him for the whole day and every other day and got to meet new people and played the greatest games I have never played before in my life and I enjoyed the game so much at a point it was the only game I play but now seeing that the game is going to be deleted tomorrow is sad to me because I been playing this game for 3 and a half years it really broke me when the day I was told the game was shutting down but at least I was able to enjoy the game while It lasted and meet new people and get friends but now it’s going to be gone but thank you rec room for making my experience fun and I will always remember the game making it the best game in vr any 
I m going to bed rip recroom the best game ever❤️

Rec Room used to feel like one of those places you could just disappear into for hours without even realizing how much time had passed, like you’d put on your headset thinking you’d only play for a little while and then suddenly it was way later than it should’ve been, but somehow it never felt like time wasted. There was always something happening, whether it was random people messing around and making each other laugh, someone getting way too competitive over a simple game, or just those quieter moments where you’d end up talking to people you didn’t even know but somehow felt completely comfortable around. It never felt forced either, everything just kind of happened naturally, like you were stepping into a space where anything could happen and usually did. Some days were chaotic and loud in the best way, full of energy and nonstop interaction, and other days were slower and almost peaceful, where you’d just hang out and talk without really doing much at all, but somehow those moments stuck with you just as much
I think what really made it special was how easy it was to feel like you were part of something, even if it was temporary. You could meet someone, spend hours playing or talking, and then never see them again, but still remember that moment like it actually mattered. There was something oddly genuine about it, like people weren’t trying to be perfect or impress anyone, they were just there, being themselves, and that made everything feel more real in a way that’s hard to explain. It’s weird looking back on it now, because the game itself is still there, it didn’t just disappear, but that feeling isn’t as easy to find anymore. Maybe it’s because people grew up and moved on, or maybe it’s just one of those things where once a certain time in your life passes, you can’t really go back and experience it the same way again. And even though you can still log in and try to relive it, it never quite hits the same, like you’re chasing something that only really existed in that moment, and now it’s just a memory that feels a little further away every time you think about it, even if a small part of you still hopes you’ll randomly stumble into that

Rec room was the very first vr game i had. it was also the game that encouraged me to buy a vr, which was the quest 2 back in 2021. 

when i was able to experience rec room i made hundreds of friends, shared memories with others, even practiced some sports throughout it. turns out me playing rec room encouraged another one of my friends to get a vr on christmas the following year. 

rec room for me isn’t just a game, it’s a place where i could settle down, meet new people, join horror maps or even paintball, be myself and get yelled at from family for screaming. 

When i heard this game was shutting down it broke me. sort of reminded me of echo vr (if you know you know) so a piece of my childhood is now going to be memories. 

thank you rec room for everything that you have done for me and my friends. without this game i wouldn’t have had as many friends today, had as much fun with my life, but sincerely thank you rec room for everything you have done for my life. 

sincerely ms pea

reviews.review_title: Goodbye old friend You will be missed
reviews.review_description:
Now sadly I never got to experience recroom in its prime I started in 2023 and honestly I know people say that’s when the game started “falling off” but for me those were some of the funnest memories I have of the game  playing golden trophy or skeleton island was some of the most fun I have ever had in life (I am not exaggerating) but during 2025 I started to slowly forget recroom and I feel so dumb for that and I wish I actually cared and went back to this game instead of waiting a whole year now coming back to this with all these memories I now wish I never forgot about this so when I heard the news of recroom shutting down I knew I had to give it a nice sweet short goodbye cause that’s what it truly deserves.
 Goodbye recroom thank you for the memories🫡 😭

This game litterally carried my childhood with all of its fun game modes and cool people I’ll miss it so much and I just got to say congrats because we graduated from somewhere atleast. Everyone will miss recroom and tomorrow it will be wiped forever. Goodbye recroom and I hope I see you again sometime soon

I may have not played for as long as others. Two years is how long I’ve played. But I share the same sadness as others in the leaving of RR. This game felt, free. It changed vr as a platform, as a community, and as a whole. Nothing like Vrchat, roblox vr, etc. could do what Rec Room did. Rec Room was funny, creative, easy to learn, hard to master. And thats what made it different. So Rec Room, thank you. Thank you for a great time, thank you for the originals, the community made, and the fun times we had.

So long, Rec Room.

- Your friend, Tatertozz.

This game is home of so many memories. Me and my friends played this countless times. I’ve been playing since I was 9! REC ROOM IS THE WHOLE REASON FOR MY USERNAME! Over two accounts (one mobile and one VR), this has been one of the best games in existence. The junior namd I got “glowing goat” carried me through my VR life. After all it was my first VR game. Ahh that was probably the best Christmas. So, goodbye my old friend, and thank you for the memories.

reviews.review_title: I will forever love this game
reviews.review_description:
Rec Room on VR has been one of my favorite games for a long time. From the first time I put on my headset and entered the colorful world, I felt like I was part of something special. It was more than just a game to me—it was a place where I could have fun, meet people, and create memories that I will never forget.

One of the things I loved most about Rec Room was the freedom it gave players. There were so many different rooms, activities, and games to explore. Whether I was playing paintball, completing quests, or just hanging out with friends, there was always something exciting to do. Every time I logged in, it felt like a new adventure was waiting for me.

The social aspect of Rec Room was another reason I enjoyed it so much. I met many friendly people from different places and had countless conversations that made me laugh. Even though we were separated by distance, VR made it feel like we were all together in the same place. Those interactions helped make the game feel alive and welcoming.

I also loved how creative the community was. Players built amazing rooms, games, and experiences that showed how much imagination people could have. Seeing what others created inspired me to be creative as well. The endless possibilities made Rec Room feel unique compared to other games.

The memories I made in Rec Room are some of my favorite gaming memories ever. I remember celebrating victories with friends, exploring new worlds, and spending hours having fun without realizing how much time had passed. Those moments brought me happiness during both good days and difficult ones.

Thinking about Rec Room shutting down makes me feel incredibly sad. It feels like losing a place that has been a part of my life for years. Knowing that all of those rooms, experiences, and memories could disappear is hard to accept. It would leave a space that cannot easily be replaced.

What makes it even more emotional is knowing that so many other players would feel the same way. Rec Room is not just a game—it is a community. Thousands of people have made friendships and memories there, and losing that shared space would affect everyone who has called it their virtual home.

Even if Rec Room were to shut down, I would always remember the fun, friendships, and experiences it gave me. It has had a lasting impact on my life and showed me how powerful virtual reality can be. No matter what happens in the future, Rec Room will always hold a special place in my heart.

Dear Rec Room,

Thank you so much for teaching us to create,to give our best in ourselves and making communities stronger. It is so sad to see rec room shutdown forever on June 1st but taught many we can do in life like make friends help each other and make your goal that you wanted to complete, and make teamwork and teamwork makes the dream work. Thank you Again Rec Room your a successful 10 years of the game and thank you admins of rec room and Coach making a successful team goodbye RecRoom you will be missed.


From ScaryTuxedo

I’ve been playing rec room ever since I got my quest two back in 2020 it was the first game I ever downloaded as soon as I hopped on the game It was one of the best games I ever played i ￼heard that it’s shutting down which is sad 2022 and 2024 were the best years of my life playing this game I’ve made so many friends and i’ve made some of the best memories of my life￼ playing this game hopefully one day it comes back until then Goodbye rec room.￼

Recroom accompanied me for roughly 6 years of my life. Even though i havent played it a lot for the last 1.5 years it was usually a great time besides the occasional incidents with other players. 

Ive met a lot of great people in this game some of them are to this day really good friends of mine. Ive made funny memories playing or talking with others. Ill never forget those moments. 

Sad to see the game go but sadly its not a big surprise for me with some of the decisions that were made by the company. 

Moderating for the game was also a fun time. Through it ive also met a lot of awesome people.

Thanks for being a big part of my life and connecting me with my boyfriend [|=)]

this game helped me improve my social skills and my social life and i'm forever grateful i was scared to talk to people in my class or outside my class but when i was playing this game i felt like i was a different person and eventually that just transferred over to my normal life now i talked to lots of people every day thank you rec room goodbye...

reviews.review_title: Thank You For The Ride Coach.
reviews.review_description: I Used To Have To Use My brothers headset I Would Play rec Room Until it would Die I Had Fun Playing vr With My Friends Even My Family I Would Have No Worries In the World In the Rec Center  Talking to Friends That I'll Never See Again Yall Gave Me An Experience That Was So Unforgettable So Many Memories And My Last Game Was A Day Before Shut In Rise Of Jumbo Tron I Tried To Beat It I Never Will Now It's Gone I Tried To Hop On Before It Shut Down I Didnt Wake Up In Time.. I Was About To Cry So Many Memories Just Gone Like That I Said The Ready To Start Or Game On Was Annoying But I Would Do Anything To Hear That Again Thank You All For The Memories I Love Yall

I hate to see it go it was the BEST game on vr ever I always feared it would shut down but I never expected it on some random Monday, It genuinely breaks my heart to realise I’ll never be able to experience 2022 backrooms and I know it had to happen I stop playing for a while but it’ll never be the same wether it’s bought or wether it’s a port of the Og game it’ll never be the same 
“You can reheat the food but it won’t taste the same”

reviews.review_title: Thank you for everything Rec Room
reviews.review_description: Back in 2018 i found this game on PlayStation and absolutely fell in love with it. I was a kid who had no friends, was bullied for liking different things, and had absolutely no way of socializing with anyone due to the nature. It wasn't until i found rec room is when things started turning around for me, suddenly i was finding people with similar interests like me, i was  making friends that i never thought i would be able to make. I fell in love with this game because it was more than just a game, it was an escape from a reality where people aren't like me. Despite the bugs, the crashing, and everything that made this game a bit difficult to play it held a special place in my heart and others alike. Thank you so much Rec Room.

I started this game when I was 7  I’ve met the nicest people on rec room. Sometimes, I would come from school and immediately hop on rec room when I had a chance. I love it so much to the point that, i would play this everyday. As soon my headset was done charging, i would go to rec room. My favorite game on rec room was dodgeball. But i wanted to say is I had a wonderful time playing your game. This was practically my whole childhood😅. But if I must say…… goodbye ❤️‍🩹

Me and a couple friends discovered rec room a few years ago and we got into build your owns we used to get on every day and make a byo now it’s mostly just me and 1 other friend and we made our own world and our own characters with the maker pen mostly tf2 characters and other fandoms kind of like indie cross but with our own and other characters it’s a shame we can’t finish the story in time though I am finishing a small plot line in the next 5 days unto rec room shuts down man it is  horrible to see it go

Rec room is to dangerous for kids. I tried using the jr accounts they do not help at all. There are petifiles on the game, people threatening others, online daters, and more. I had an experience where somebody threatened me to date them or they would kill me. And my parents found out and now I don’t have excess to it no more. There are hackers on the game. He got his ex girlfriend to hack my account to keep me from blocking him. He told me if I tried anything to tell my parents he would kill my entire family. So rec room is not safe for kids. Your report system doesn’t do anything. So that’s why I hate rec room. So fix it please so I can convince my parents to let me back on it
Edit from a year later: Wow the game is shutting down? I’m not even surprised

I've played this game for as long as I can remember, from Xbox to VR, but never did I think that it would shut down. I understand why, but it still, honestly, hurts to see it go. The friends we all made, the games we all played, communities; it reminds me of a phrase. "𝙉𝙤𝙗𝙤𝙙𝙮 𝙘𝙖𝙧𝙚𝙨 𝙪𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙡 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙜𝙤𝙣𝙚."

I came back from school when suddenly a text shown on the orange board when you open the game saying "failed to download required data" like what do i even do i play this every single day without the text showing up so coach hear me out... fix YOUR GAME PLEASE AND GIVE US VOICE CALL BACK!!!

If there was more stars I would rate it higher. It’s so sad to see go but all we can do is wait.

reviews.review_description: I’ve made plenty of friends in rec room, I actually met one of my first ever vr friends in rec room, so it’s just been kind of hard to see one of my favorite games go down, it’s sad but look at it, but it’s good to see one of the greatest vr games ever, finally getting rest.. we’ve had plenty of fun. And like coach says, “Game On!!”

I have been living life in this game since 2022 on the PlayStation. I met so many amazing people and made so many friends. I had first logged on in August of 2022 because of my friend Charles. I haven’t talked to him since 2023. Me and some of my other friends speed ran the quests. This game is one of the 7 things that make me be me. I really really really hope that Rec Room isn’t shutting down and if it is. Rest in peace Rec Room

Guys our fun time must change …

RecRoom was my favorite game in vr In around 2016 - 2017 we and my brother played it its was fun at the start fool around act like kid so childish back then, we always loved it, in 2022 - 2023 (I think) my cousin like playing it and like laser tag volleyball and fnaf Getting chase by Ignited Freddy and some horror games, it was fun for him In his young age and played almost whole day, every time he get out of school and First play recroom straight away, made a lot of fun friends it was wholesome memories, I started returning it in 2022-2023 cause i would like to play and see if updates changed new games or explored new, I really liked game like my cousin played so much fun and better than some other vr games, I could chill, relax Horror games and More!, my brother does the same thing and he enjoyed it more, I’ve never seen him played recroom too often but he likes playing horror games collecting and other stuff!

So yeah recroom whole community was fun at beginning but…it’s time we get things to let go and stay it where it be…

Overall Us as a community will miss you sincerely and we will give our rec room best til’ the end. Thank you.

Rec room at a small point in my life was my favorite vr game but it over time became really stale uninteresting and just flat out irritating but.. even if I wouldn’t say I like the game I feel devastated that it shut down since it was “Roblox on Vr” which made it one of the first vr games I choose to play when I get a vr I had alot of fun with it but overtime the game got boring and uninteresting with bad game choices, obnoxious fanbase and just painfully awful.. hell I wasn’t even interested of the game when I found out it was shutting down and I’ll be honest if it didn’t shut down and the game was still working as normal. I probably wouldn’t Care about it.. but it did shut down … and weirdly enough it stings even though I don’t like the game I feel devastated that it’s gone.. so even if the game doesn’t hit the same anymore all I want to say is

RIP Rec Room
2016-2026
Maybe not one of the greatest games… but still a game I’m sad to see it end

I’ve been playing this game since 2019, and it has its pros and cons. Everyone who’s new, or is a veteran still and will play it. The only reason Rec Room is falling off is because of the RR team quitting the quest department, and the possible removal of the beloved OG bean body. Also with the addition of UGC, creators can now make things that RR hasn’t, but can lead to the destruction of the game entirely.

Rec Room, if you see this, at least know that you probably should listen to the community. We want things like quests, and new stuff (NOT LEVEL CAP UPDATES) that will interest us.

Peace.

EDIT: Rec Room, you have meant so much to me. Through covid and so much more, I had nothing else to do. You solved that. Thank you for making me the best version of myself. 

-Senator Cyber, the guy who always gave it his Rec Room best.

reviews.review_title: Rest in peace rec room you were loved
reviews.review_description:
Rec room was a very good game for many. I wish that its time could have been longer. Many people that played rec room will look back on it and miss it. Sometimes its good to let things go but seeing that last update screen breaks my heart Every time i see it. All the memories you gave us will never be forgotten. 


    I remember the last Time i logged on. It was the morning of the shut down. I looked at my dorm for the last time. It was still decorated for Christmas. Now that i think about it i should have spent more time just adming my dorm. It took me hours to build. Sadly my memory is foggy so i cant remember much of that morning but i knew that i was going to miss it. 


    10 years of rec room was never enough time. Rec room has a special place in all of our hearts. Rest in peace and fly high.        
                    
                RIP rec room

Rec room ￼ you have been there for me every day. I got home from school. I would hop on my Meta quest just to play all the fun games. We had all the tokens I’ve gotten I will never forget the iconic“game on”. All the games I played stunt runner rise of Jumbotron golden trophy, paddle ball I’ll never forget, watching videos of the countdown when I saw you a.k.a. the coach moving her finger to the button slowly when she pressed it, rec room was gone forever keep you in my heart rec room if you see this, please try to start a new version of rec room. I miss you. 
￼

I’ve grown up with this game and I really can’t believe this is the end after all this time after all the hours spent on this game and now it’s gone just like that. Eventually we will have to let go off it and cherish the memories we made along the way so remember to give it your Rec Room best, Coach would of wanted you to atleast.

About the game 

It’s Fun as hell☑️ 

Easily meet moderator in each game☑️

The backrooms☑️ 

Guns like Ohio☑️ 

——————————

Movement 

Walking ☑️

Crouching like your getting sturdy☑️

Running ✖️ you are running slow as hell 

———————————-

Graphics 

The way it looks like 👍🏾 it’s decent 


⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️























And don’t play silent hill on rec room

I know the deletion of this game is permanent., but I really hope that we could have rec room again. Rec room has always been such a good community from the start to end even though we’ve had a problem. It was never that big of a deal. I’ve had this game for six years and I think it was the best six years of my life. you brought me out of a depression and really helped me with social situations. I loved creating characters there and I spent so much money on that game. I’m not gonna lie. I never got to say goodbye to the game and that’s what makes me really sad. forever mourning you like a passed loved one.

I guess is the end of the road of recroom, I’ve haven’t been playing this for days until when I saw it on YouTube, I was not expecting that to appear on my yt recommended, but I just felt different lately about hearing a game shutting down.

It’s sad to hear a game shutting down that have been in is this world for a decade.

But it is what it is, this is something I would miss 😔

reviews.review_title: I've been here since the beginning
reviews.review_description: i remember when i was younger on the quest 1 i saw rec room i started playing it and for years and years I've played rec room its amazing to try new games plays pvps byos horror games I've been playing forever since it was 1 years old so now it breaks my heart from the news i thought it was a 10 year anniversary but thank you for all the memories i just want it to be back and get more rank s+ on plays that how i got my hat i wore for year but thank rec room thanks coach for everything. Phantom

i originally thought that the rec room shutdown was fake, just a rumor. but oh no it was not, i am being honest when i say this, i genuinely cried when the game shut down. being there with all those people as the game finally shut down and pushed us out was so sad.
RecRoom wil ALWAYS hold a place deep in my heart, and remember "Always give it your Rec Room best!"
goodbye, RecRoom you will always be missed

Ive Been playing this game since when i first got my headset around 7 years ago. This game changed me taught me things a teacher couldnt while letting spend time with friends even making some along the way. Seeing something I've loved so much being shut down is truly heartbreaking so heartbreaking i couldnt bring myself to play before it was gone. But i have faith that just like real life when somebody moves out of their dorm someone will move in. RIP RecRoom you will be missed.

This was the first VR game I played when I joined the VR community in 2020 and it was like my escape from reality it was my home,I made so many friends I remember my first paintball game and my last. My first Laser Tag game and my last. My first time beating trophy quest and my last time beating it. I will miss you forever I loved this game.🥹😢
-HuskyVR

rec room was such a good game i remember playing it all the time i wish i could play it more but the shut down is permanent i was such a good game for meeting new friends i will forever miss you rec room and also don't forget to give it your rec room best

Hello I am icy blue I started rec room in 2020 playing games making friends but before rec room I was depressed about life and my mistakes but u till I was told about this game I thought I give it a try but as life moved on I really loved this game and for everyone that is sad rec room is shutting down nothing will replace rec room this will always be the best game and as I graduated college I am class of 2026 in rec room and in college this game has a special place in my heart.

After 5 years of playing, starting out on my PSVR, making tons of friends, enjoying games like desert PVP and dragon ball z PvP 2. It’s time to say goodbye, I don’t want too, but farewell rec room. I will always remember how you changed my VR experience, and how you changed VR as a whole.
Rec room was always there for us, but we weren’t always there for rec room, and now it’s gone, you will always have a special place in my VR rec room 🏫

Rec room has been my favorite game, I started playing when I was 5 now I’m 11 pls bring it back and it might revive. Rec room was my childhood, also think about how much money people spent, they will not get any refunds and that’s the bad thing about shutting it down. Rec room has been people childhood like mine that’s why I think it should come back, think about all the attention it’s getting now, big YouTubers like kreekcraft has mentioned your game. This game is getting a lot of attention so  you should bring it back it might attract other people because of it popularity

rec room is what got me into VR and this is what sparked my love for art there is never going to be a game quite like rec room there can be many alike but nothing that can have as big of as an impact as rec room dude. i still can't believe that the game i grew up with is shutting down no matter what even 50 years from now i'm still gonna miss rec room this game was probably one of the only games ever to grasp the concept of vr players and really any console to play together this game has built so many of my friendships and made me so happy i'm still so sad it's shutting down and everyone reading this goodbye and farewell to rec room

I started playing rec room in 2017 and over time i enjoyed making friends and meeting people this shutdown really breaks my heart but just I really love rec room and I really wish it was around longer I know it had a long run science 2016 cause for gods sake it was around for ten years and I made a lot of games even if they weren’t popular it was so fun making the games so I just want to say goodbye…

All I have to say is rec room is a good game and it helps socialize people and play with your friends and have a good time on that day. I know shutdown is happening, but please save rec room￼ everyone enjoys rec room people have been working on it for months even years as an example like dorms they might have a hard time making a world that they want people to play, but the shut down is happening probably there now really disappointed, but the shut down I know it’s for a reason.

PLEASE SAVE REC ROOM

Good chance good luck

reviews.review_title: Glad I got to play it
reviews.review_description:
I recently seen video of rumors about this game shutting down but I didn’t really believe it considering how much people online like to lie but when I actually seen proof it was kinda sad since a lot of people played the game for years and actually made connections but all I can say is I’m glad I played this game and even getting to meet new friends on it 

-Randi

Rec room was such a good game and the memories are unforgettable I will miss this game so much I’m rlly sad that they have to shut it down I made a lot log friends on here that I’ve never met sadly not friends to this day but all though it was a great game hopefully there will be another game like this one day but i guess this is good bye thank u rec room for all the good memories and friends and fun we all had we will miss u sad to see it gone☹️

I always loved this game and have been playing since I was young. Ive been playing since 2018 and it was my first ever game on my vr headset. I will forever remember the memories I had in this game. I always gave it my Rec Room best and always will. Rec room was a part of my childhood, I played it all the time with my brother and my friends. I wish everyone on the dev team a good life as we say goodbye. I loved rec room, it brought me joy to me sadness, i loved messing around with friends and I was a developer/artist of many games inside rec room myself. I love creating and currently working on many projects outside of media and games. I loved creating games with people and even met new people, Im not one to socialize but working with others helped me to make friends. I was there before the shut down. And, Happy 10th birthday Rec Room. 

Goodbye Rec Room.  

And remember, Give it your Rec Room Best!

As we all can probably say yes to. We all have grown up with RecRoom and to see that is has shutdown permanently makes us all sad. I remember a few years back I played the backrooms all seeing and thought “Man, I should make my own game” Few years later here I am writing a review for a app that shut down while my backrooms game is still in progress😭 or when I wanted to S tier every quest so far I have NONE of those quest s tiered…


                      Goodbye RecRoom🥹✌️
We will all miss and remember what you gave all of us

reviews.review_title: Rec Room: The best school yet!
reviews.review_description: It was sad to see Rec Room go, but at least it was fun while it lasted. You just lived in a school where it offered the best activities including the RR originals, like a school play.  Like I wish it was a real school to be in, I'll kill for my life here. Let just hope no one forgets this piece of gem!

Goodbye Rec Room 🫡. You helped me make great memories, grinned for tokens, and having fun in the custom rooms, but nothing last forever they said, so we come for this month for one last goodbye. Thanks for shaping what I am to this point. Hopefully they make a Comeback one day.


-“Rec Room is going down for schedule maintenance; Right now.”
                                                 -Coach 2016-2026

So your game was just to good why did u shut down it it was like the best game ever since I had it so I love u and your game and its like a game that you can make a friend so can you please post this on your YouTube channel but I love u and your game so goooooooooooooo ooooooooooooooooooood bye rec room 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭 I will miss you!!!!!!!!!!!😭😭😭

reviews.review_title: Rec Room meant everything to me
reviews.review_description: Without Rec Room, I’m not sure I’d be alive right now. I first joined Rec Room during some of the darkest moments of my life. I had been dealing with bullying for years and after being diagnosed with Crohn’s Disease, I had to go on a fast from solid foods for 95 days. It was so bad, I considered ending my life. But yet, Rec Room came into my life and quite literally saved me. I couldn’t be more grateful for a game and ever since then, I’ve been a huge fan of this game. To see it gone now is absolutely tragic, because now I feel like my vr has nothing for me. Sure, I’ve joined Vanilla & Radium and those act as great substitutes for Rec Room, but they definitely don’t compare to the original game. Devs, please don’t let it rot away. Do something with it. Either take another chance and fix the mistakes it had or hand it off to someone else who will restore it, because it definitely deserves it.

Rec Room used to feel like one of those places you could just disappear into for hours without even realizing how much time had passed, like you’d put on your headset thinking you’d only play for a little while and then suddenly it was way later than it should’ve been, but somehow it never felt like time wasted. There was always something happening, whether it was random people messing around and making each other laugh, someone getting way too competitive over a simple game, or just those quieter moments where you’d end up talking to people you didn’t even know but somehow felt completely comfortable around. It never felt forced either, everything just kind of happened naturally, like you were stepping into a space where anything could happen and usually did. Some days were chaotic and loud in the best way, full of energy and nonstop interaction, and other days were slower and almost peaceful, where you’d just hang out and talk without really doing much at all, but somehow those moments stuck with you just as much
I think what really made it special was how easy it was to feel like you were part of something, even if it was temporary. You could meet someone, spend hours playing or talking, and then never see them again, but still remember that moment like it actually mattered. There was something oddly genuine about it, like people weren’t trying to be perfect or impress anyone, they were just there, being themselves, and that made everything feel more real in a way that’s hard to explain. It’s weird looking back on it now, because the game itself is still there, it didn’t just disappear, but that feeling isn’t as easy to find anymore. Maybe it’s because people grew up and moved on, or maybe it’s just one of those things where once a certain time in your life passes, you can’t really go back and experience it the same way again. And even though you can still log in and try to relive it, it never quite hits the same, like you’re chasing something that only really existed in that moment, and now it’s just a memory that feels a little further away every time you think about it, even if a small part of you still hopes you’ll randomly stumble into that
